name: 1 MG Finasteride Tablets USP
about: 1 MG Finasteride Tablets USP are a type of general medicine used to treat male pattern baldness (androgenetic alopecia) in men. These tablets are available in a pack of 10*10 tablets and each tablet contains 1mg of the active ingredient Finasteride. The tablets come in a physical form and should be stored in a dry and cool place. The medicine is manufactured in India and should be taken as per the doctors suggestion.

faq.q: What is the active ingredient in 1 MG Finasteride Tablets USP?
faq.a: The active ingredient in 1 MG Finasteride Tablets USP is Finasteride.

faq.q: What is the dosage of these tablets?
faq.a: Each tablet contains 1mg of Finasteride and the dosage should be taken as per the doctors suggestion.

faq.q: What is the recommended storage condition for these tablets?
faq.a: These tablets should be stored in a dry and cool place.

faq.q: Are these tablets suitable for women?
faq.a: No, these tablets are only suitable for men.

faq.q: Can these tablets be used to treat other medical conditions?
faq.a: No, these tablets are specifically used to treat male pattern baldness and should not be used to treat any other medical condition.
